headline: Apollo CEO calls out private-credit shakeout
summary: Marc Rowan is not trying to hide the private-credit pain. At Bloomberg Invest in New York on Tuesday, March 3, the Apollo Global Management CEO said the $1.8 trillion private-credit industry faces a "foreseeable" prolonged shakeout. "And all you can do is have been a good underwriter, a good risk ...

headline: Shares of private credit companies are trading lower after reports suggested that BlackRock limited redemptions from a $26 billion private credit fund. Curtailed redemptions may sow concern about industry health and contagion risk.

headline: OWL Stock Is Down Over 30% This Year— How Private Credit Meltdown Is Exposing 'Cockroaches' In The Market
